_comment: Host registry for the devops agent's remote_exec tool. Copy to hosts.json (gitignored) and edit. A host is unreachable unless listed here (opt-in boundary); 'sudo' is per-host. NEVER list the kronk box itself — the ops agent must not be able to target its own host. Keys live in secrets/, referenced by container path. The 'magicmirror' host is auto-synthesized from MM_SSH_* env if this file is absent, so you only need this file to add MORE hosts.

magicmirror.description: MagicMirror Raspberry Pi — Electron kiosk on :8080
